title: chrysanthemum zawadzkii var. mongolicum
intro: Chrysanthemum zawadzkii var. mongolicum, also known as Mongolian chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in Asian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and promoting relaxation and improved sleep. Chrysanthemum zawadzkii var. mongolicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tonics, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
